summary: Testing iteration for notification banner and website gallery features. All backend tests passed (15/15). Frontend UI testing verified notification banner, website gallery photos, login flow, planning views (day/week/month), and public booking page.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing online bookings (7 unseen) and gallery items (8 photos).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Notification banner feature is working correctly. Gallery photos are loading from customer-assets.emergentagent.com. The planning page shows online booking notifications in a banner at the top with dismiss functionality. All views (daily, weekly, monthly) are functioning correctly.

FEATURE_Notification_Banner_Display.details: Banner shows 'X nuove prenotazioni online!' with list of unseen online bookings. Shows client name, date, time, and service name.

FEATURE_Mark_All_Seen.details: 'Segna tutte lette' button found and functional. Calls POST /api/notifications/mark-seen with all appointment IDs.

FEATURE_Individual_Dismiss.details: Individual X buttons dismiss single bookings. Banner count updates (5->4) when booking dismissed.

FEATURE_Click_Navigate_To_Date.details: Clicking a booking in banner navigates to that date in daily view. Verified: clicked 2026-02-26 booking -> page showed 'mercoledì 25 febbraio 2026'.

FEATURE_Polling_30_Seconds.details: PlanningPage.jsx useEffect sets up 30-second interval to poll /api/notifications/new-bookings. Code verified in lines 167-178.

FEATURE_Website_Gallery_Photos.details: Website page (/sito) displays 4 salon photos: 'Il Salone', 'Reception', 'Interni', 'Postazioni'. All images load from customer-assets.emergentagent.com.

FEATURE_Gallery_Works_Photos.details: Gallery also contains 4 hairstyle work photos with section='works'. Total 8 gallery items.

FEATURE_Public_Booking_Page.details: Public booking page (/prenota) loads landing page with 'PRENOTA ORA' button. 3-step booking flow: Services -> Date/Time/Operator -> Client Details. All services displayed with prices.

FEATURE_Login_Flow.details: Login with provided credentials works. Uses data-testid selectors: login-email-input, login-password-input, login-submit-btn.

FEATURE_Planning_Daily_View.details: Daily view shows time grid (14:00, 14:30, 15:00...) with operator columns. Appointments displayed with colors and client names.

FEATURE_Planning_Weekly_View.details: Weekly view shows 7 days (LUN-DOM) with appointment cards. Shows time, client name, and service.

FEATURE_Planning_Monthly_View.details: Monthly calendar shows all days with appointment counts and previews. Legend shows 'Da fare' and 'Completato' status.

FEATURE_Day_Navigation.details: Prev/Next day buttons work. 'Oggi' button available. Date changes correctly when navigating.

api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/notifications/new-bookings: Returns list of online bookings (source='online'). 7 bookings returned.
api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/notifications/mark-seen: Marks bookings as seen by setting seen_at timestamp. Response: {marked: N}
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/public/website: Returns config, reviews, gallery (8 items), and services. Gallery has salon and works sections.
api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/auth/login: Returns access_token and user info on success, 401 on failure.
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/public/services: Returns list of services with id, name, duration, price.
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/operators: Returns list of active operators with colors.

screenshots_taken: .screenshots/website_page_gallery.png - Website gallery section showing 4 salon photos
.screenshots/login_success.png - Planning page after login with notification banner
.screenshots/after_booking_click.png - Page after clicking booking in banner (navigated to date)
.screenshots/booking_services.png - Service selection step of booking flow
.screenshots/daily_view.png - Daily planning view with operator columns
.screenshots/weekly_view.png - Weekly planning view with appointment cards
